acceptance_criteria.text: Backend exposes an authenticated, business-scoped Operator attention brief endpoint for `Что требует моего внимания сегодня?`.
proof: src/api/operator_api.py uses require_auth_from_request and verify_business_access before returning a brief.

acceptance_criteria.text: Attention brief uses cached LocalOS data only and returns structured JSON with summary, metrics, freshness, action items, action classes, and explicit execution limits.
proof: src/services/operator_attention.py builds the brief from existing tables only.
The response includes business, intent, data_mode, summary, metrics, freshness, items, action_class, and limits.
tests/test_operator_attention.py verifies cached mode and no paid/external execution flags.

acceptance_criteria.text: The implementation does not run paid external refreshes, AI generation, external writes, provider publication, schema migrations, or production data changes.
proof: src/services/operator_attention.py performs read-only SELECT queries and does not call parsers, GigaChat, provider APIs, ledger writers, or publication tools.
No Alembic migration or schema mutation file was added.
The brief returns paid_actions_performed=false and external_writes_performed=false.

acceptance_criteria.text: Dashboard includes a first Operator web surface at `/dashboard/operator` that calls the endpoint and displays the cached brief, signals, freshness, and paid-refresh limitation.
Documentation marks the Sprint 1 cached MVP as available/beta without implying unsupported provider write support or public MCP availability.
proof: docs/agents/localos-operator.md marks Operator status as beta and documents the Sprint 1 routes.
docs/agents/localos-operator.md states Sprint 1 does not execute paid refreshes, AI generation, provider writes, or external publication.
docs/agents/index.md describes the cached web intent and preserves public MCP/provider write limitations.

acceptance_criteria.text: Proof-loop evidence records changed files and validation checks.
proof: .agent/tasks/operator-sprint1-attention-brief-20260520/evidence.md and evidence.json record changed files and checks.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: rg -n "operator|attention-brief|Что требует моего внимания|paid_actions_performed|external_writes_performed|provider write|MCP" src frontend/src docs/agents .agent/tasks/operator-sprint1-attention-brief-20260520/spec.md
rg -n "опубликовал ответ|отправил ответ в карты|autonomously write|public MCP server is confirmed|direct map reply publishing" docs/agents src frontend/src
known_gaps: Sprint 1 does not implement freeform LLM chat.
Sprint 1 does not implement paid refresh execution or consent storage.
Sprint 1 does not route Telegram commands to the Operator core yet.
Sprint 1 does not publish to map providers or other third-party systems.
